post.description:
Streaming: no idempotency in Phase 1.

First-chunk errors are preflighted so status codes are not committed as 200 first.

get.description: Readiness probe — all dependencies are reachable.

schema.title: Response Info Api V1 Info Get

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: Optional expression evaluated to decide traversal

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Higher priority edges are evaluated first

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique node identifier within the workflow

handler.title: Handler
handler.description: Dotted Python path to the handler callable

field.title: Field
field.description: Dot-path to the field being evaluated

operator.title: Operator
operator.description: Comparison operator (eq, neq, in, not_in, gt, lt, matches)

backoff_multiplier.title: Backoff Multiplier
backoff_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to backoff after each attempt

retryable_errors.title: Retryable Errors
retryable_errors.description: Error class names eligible for retry

feed_url.title: Feed Url
feed_url.description: HTTPS URL for models.dev-style JSON (must pass SSRF policy).

SyncModelsDevRequest.title: SyncModelsDevRequest
SyncModelsDevRequest.description: Optional override; when omitted, ``Settings.models_dev_feed_url`` is used.
